title: Enhanced Villagers
body:
# Villager Mod

Minecraft mod that enhances the villagers.

Core idea is to enhance villagers to make them act more like players, based on the existing vanilla logic.

## Current features

- Real villager trade
  - Will only trade what is in their inventory (no more magic item spawning)
  - Trades will update villagers inventory
- Villager has larger inventor (36 slot like the player)
- Villager want to buy food when needed
- Villager will sell excess food
- Every villagers will trade (including uemployed, nitwit and children)

## Future features

- Merchant profession
- Real villagers crafting
  - Will only craft what is craftable from what is in their inventory
  - Will need tools / machines
- Villager will buy what they need for crafting
- Villager picks up any dropped items (like they pick up some food items)
- Villager to villager trade
- Configurable trades

## Links

* Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enhanced-villagers
* Modrinth: https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-villagers
* Discord: https://discord.latibro.com
